evals.prompt: Our admin CSV export sometimes returns an empty file after a session refresh. The user sees a successful download, but the CSV only has headers. I want you to diagnose it before changing code.
evals.expected_output: A diagnosis-first response that builds a reproduction loop, distinguishes hypotheses, and refuses to jump straight to a patch.
expectations: Uses a tight feedback loop or reproduction step before proposing code changes.
States at least two plausible hypotheses and how to confirm or rule them out.
Mentions minimising the failure to the exact user-described empty CSV symptom.
Includes regression-test or verification proof after the fix.
